message:
chore(beads): file + close 2 CONFORMANCE beads (ctype.h, string.h)

bd-mk07a CONFORMANCE: libc ctype.h diff matrix
bd-1erld CONFORMANCE: libc string.h pure functions diff matrix

Both shipped via differential harness commit 631b5100. Zero divergences
against glibc. Filed via JSONL because br create / br close are still
blocked behind the long-running stuck br sync processes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1104,3 +1104,5 @@
 {"id":"bd-zqfo","title":"session: execute session_ops.json fixture family through harness matrix","description":"Concrete gap: crates/frankenlibc-harness/tests/session_ops_conformance_test.rs currently validates session fixture metadata only. Add isolated harness subprocess execution for tests/conformance/fixtures/session_ops.json, assert expected_output and host parity in strict/hardened modes, and fix any matrix-path regressions the new coverage exposes.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-21T05:43:34.255617793Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-21T15:12:51.666485362Z","closed_at":"2026-04-21T15:12:51.663057292Z","close_reason":"Executed session_ops fixture coverage through the isolated harness conformance matrix path and verified via rch.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-zukz","title":"test: verify timerfd_create combined flag propagation","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-20T20:16:40.640998356Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-20T20:19:07.428657062Z","closed_at":"2026-04-20T20:19:07.426389611Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-zuy8","title":"Conformance: add execute_* handlers for startup_ops family (3 symbols)","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"SilverHarbor","created_at":"2026-04-18T01:56:29.041196427Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-18T02:06:07.938543327Z","closed_at":"2026-04-18T02:06:07.936545455Z","close_reason":"Implemented startup_ops fixture execution for __frankenlibc_startup_phase0, __frankenlibc_startup_snapshot, and __libc_start_main. The executor now maps startup fixture inputs to deterministic deny/fallback/secure-mode contract outputs without invoking real process startup, and startup_ops_conformance_test executes all fixture cases through frankenlibc_fixture_exec. Verified via rch: cargo test -p frankenlibc-harness --test startup_ops_conformance_test -- --nocapture; cargo check -p frankenlibc-harness -p frankenlibc_conformance --tests; cargo clippy -p frankenlibc-harness -p frankenlibc_conformance --tests -- -D warnings. Also ran cargo fmt --check and git diff --check.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["conformance","testing"]}
+{"id":"bd-mk07a","title":"CONFORMANCE: libc ctype.h diff matrix","description":"Differential conformance harness shipped in commit 631b5100 (crates/frankenlibc-abi/tests/conformance_diff_ctype.rs).

Coverage:
- 12 classifiers (isalpha/isdigit/isalnum/isspace/isupper/islower/isprint/ispunct/isxdigit/isblank/iscntrl/isgraph)
- 2 transformers (toupper/tolower)
- Sweep: EOF + every byte 0..=255 (257 inputs)
- 3598 differential calls vs glibc reference
- 0 divergences observed

Result: ctype.h family is conformant against glibc in the C/POSIX locale.

Run: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_libc_conformance_cc cargo test -p frankenlibc-abi --test conformance_diff_ctype","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"cod-frankenlibc","created_at":"2026-04-24T04:00:00.000000000Z","created_by":"cod-frankenlibc","updated_at":"2026-04-24T04:00:00.000000000Z","closed_at":"2026-04-24T04:00:00.000000000Z","close_reason":"Harness shipped in commit 631b5100; 0 divergences against glibc.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["conformance","differential"]}
+{"id":"bd-1erld","title":"CONFORMANCE: libc string.h pure functions diff matrix","description":"Differential conformance harness shipped in commit 631b5100 (crates/frankenlibc-abi/tests/conformance_diff_string.rs).

Coverage:
- 9 pure functions: strchr, strrchr, strstr, strpbrk, strspn, strcspn, strnlen, memchr, memcmp
- 5-13 hand-curated edge-case inputs per function (empty, single-char, no-match, match-at-start/end, embedded NUL, high bytes, overlapping needles, bound-cuts-match, bound-includes-match, usize::MAX bound)
- Comparisons: offset-from-base for pointer returns, exact length for size_t returns, sign-of-result for memcmp
- 0 divergences observed

Result: string.h pure-function subset is conformant against glibc.

Out of scope (mutating string functions deferred to subsequent harness):
- strcpy/strncpy/strcat/strncat/strerror/strerror_r/strdup/strndup/strtok_r

Run: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_libc_conformance_cc cargo test -p frankenlibc-abi --test conformance_diff_string","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"cod-frankenlibc","created_at":"2026-04-24T04:00:00.000000000Z","created_by":"cod-frankenlibc","updated_at":"2026-04-24T04:00:00.000000000Z","closed_at":"2026-04-24T04:00:00.000000000Z","close_reason":"Harness shipped in commit 631b5100; 0 divergences against glibc.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["conformance","differential"]}
